race.comment: ARCTIC SNOW (8) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 1100m at this track. Better suited over this distance today and should be better for that effort. Likely improver with strong prospects. VIVA MARCONI (2) returned from a break last start and was having his first run on dirt for a new stable when beaten 2.25 lengths into fourth over 1000m at this track. Should park just off the speed despite the draw. Will play a major role. SEMPRE (4) made considerable ground in the run home to finish second last start over 1100m at this track. Best form puts him right in this. MOMENT IN THE SUN (1) finished eighth at this track and distance at his last appearance ten months ago. Finds the right race on resumption. ANGEL LIKE YOU (10) is next best after a good performance last time out.
